mapper.update:
update TB_TRADER_OPEN_APPLY
oid_partner = #{oidPartner,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
apply_serial_id = #{applySerialId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
entrust_id = #{entrustId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trader_name = #{traderName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bank_chnl = #{bankChnl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bank_customer_id = #{bankCustomerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bank_chnl_name = #{bankChnlName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bank_account = #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bank_account_name = #{bankAccountName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
finance_name = #{financeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
finance_id_type = #{financeIdType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
finance_id_no = #{financeIdNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
finance_exp_start = #{financeExpStart,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
finance_exp_end = #{financeExpEnd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
finance_mobile = #{financeMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
com_expire_start = #{comExpireStart,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
legal_expire_start = #{legalExpireStart,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bank_contract_file = #{bankContractFile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
auth_contract_file = #{authContractFile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
register_json = #{registerJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
ext = #{ext,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where apply_id = #{applyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update TB_TRADER_OPEN_APPLY set oid_partner = #{oidPartner,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, apply_serial_id = #{applySerialId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, entrust_id = #{entrustId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trader_name = #{traderName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_chnl = #{bankChnl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_customer_id = #{bankCustomerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_chnl_name = #{bankChnlName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_account = #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_account_name = #{bankAccountName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, finance_name = #{financeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, finance_id_type = #{financeIdType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, finance_id_no = #{financeIdNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, finance_exp_start = #{financeExpStart,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, finance_exp_end = #{financeExpEnd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, finance_mobile = #{financeMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, com_expire_start = #{comExpireStart,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, legal_expire_start = #{legalExpireStart,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_contract_file = #{bankContractFile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, auth_contract_file = #{authContractFile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, register_json = #{registerJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, ext = #{ext,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where apply_id = #{applyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
